summary: Tested MEA Upload page for the NEHER cardiac electrophysiology platform redesign. All 6 requested features verified successfully via Playwright UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: MEAUpload.js: 1120 lines - consider splitting parsing logic into separate utility module
MEAAnalysis.js: 1240 lines - consider splitting chart components into separate files
MEAUpload.js has proper data-testid attributes: mea-upload-page, mea-parse-btn, mea-run-analysis-btn, mea-select-wells-page
Drop zone correctly styled with drop-zone-mea class and accepts .csv files
Glass surface styling properly applied for glassmorphism dark theme
Burst data parsing fix (lines 483-491, 509-520) correctly uses row.stop field
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEA Upload page verified working. Key test-ids: mea-upload-page, mea-parse-btn, mea-run-analysis-btn. File drop accepts .csv files. Back button navigates to home. Test data available at /app/mea_test_data/ with 5 CSV files.

features_verified.mea_upload_page_loads: PASS - data-testid='mea-upload-page' found, page renders correctly
features_verified.required_files_listed: PASS - All 5 CSV files listed: spike_list.csv, electrode_burst_list.csv, network_burst_list.csv, spike_counts.csv, environmental_data.csv
features_verified.glassmorphism_styling: PASS - glass-surface and glass-surface-subtle classes present, backdrop-filter effects applied
features_verified.file_drop_zone_functional: PASS - drop-zone-mea class found, accepts .csv files with multiple attribute
features_verified.back_button_to_home: PASS - Back button visible and returns to home page with SEM/MEA cards
features_verified.analyze_files_button_disabled: PASS - Analyze Files button (data-testid='mea-parse-btn') present and disabled when no files uploaded

ui_verification.subtitle: Upload the 5 required CSV files from your MEA export
ui_verification.drop_zone_text: Drop CSV files here / or click to browse
ui_verification.required_files_section: Required files: with 5 file descriptions and filenames
ui_verification.styling: Glassmorphism dark theme with teal accent (MEA color)
